summary: Plan-mode PR inventory classification shard. No shared canonical was selected because the job explicitly says this is not a dedupe cluster. Hydrated PRs are kept as independent backlog items except #74302, which is routed to security because the PR body describes untrusted workspace provider execution across a trust boundary. Refs missing from the compacted preflight artifact are scoped needs_human for hydration, not closure.
